Frequently Asked Questions

Double-column volar distal radial plate with titanium construction and Bionik Gold Surface. Provides superior fixation for complex distal radius fractures. Available in multiple widths and configurations.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the 2.4mm LPS Double-Column Distal Radial Plate Volar, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The 2.4mm LPS Double-Column Distal Radial Plate Volar is constructed using Titanium Alloy with TiNbN Coating, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
